dashboard.goalShareLinkDesc: Every Basic referral earns you ${{commission}}/month. Just {{needed}} referrals and your ${{cost}} membership pays for itself.

dashboard.goal1MoreDesc: You have {{refs}} referral(s) earning you ${{earning}}/month. One more and your ${{cost}} membership is fully covered.

dashboard.goalNMoreDesc: You have {{refs}} referral(s) earning you ${{earning}}/month. {{remaining}} more and your membership costs you nothing.
dashboard.goalEarningMonthDesc: Your membership pays for itself and you're profiting ${{profit}}/month. Hit 10 referrals for ${{target}}/month.
dashboard.goalGridDesc: Your {{tierName}} grid has {{filled}} of {{total}} positions filled. {{remaining}} more and you unlock the completion bonus.
dashboard.goalWithdrawDesc: Your affiliate wallet has ${{balance}}. The minimum withdrawal is $10.
dashboard.goalOneMoreComm: One more referral commission and you're there.
dashboard.goalKeepBuilding: Keep building your referrals to reach the threshold.
dashboard.goalWatchCompleteDesc: You've watched all {{required}} video(s) today. You're qualified for campaign wallet withdrawals. Resets at midnight.
dashboard.goalWatchNotStarted: You haven't watched today's videos yet
dashboard.goalWatchNMore: {{remaining}} more video(s) to complete today's watch

network.title: My Network & Earnings
network.subtitle: Your referrals, team, and commission history
network.shareYourLink: Share your referral link to start building your network
network.commissionsAppear: Commissions appear here as your network grows

compPlan.title: Compensation Plan
compPlan.subtitle: Your complete guide to earning with SuperAdPro
compPlan.referMembersEarn: Refer members and earn recurring monthly commissions for as long as they stay active. Two tiers, two commission levels, one simple model.
compPlan.earnEveryMonth: Earn every month your referral stays active — not just the first month
compPlan.referAsManyAsYouWant: Refer as many members as you want. No ceiling on membership commissions
compPlan.commissionCredited: Commission credited to your wallet the moment their payment processes
compPlan.qualificationRuleDesc: To earn commissions at a tier, you must have an active (or in-grace) campaign at that same tier or higher. If unqualified, the commission goes to the platform. Each upline level is checked individually.
compPlan.everyNewMemberFillsASeat: Every new member fills a seat in your grid
compPlan.keepOddPassEven: You keep your 1st, 3rd, 5th sale (odd numbers). Sales 2, 4, 6, 8 (even numbers) pass up to your direct sponsor.
compPlan.fullCoursePriceOnKeptSales: Full course price on every kept sale — zero platform fees
compPlan.noCapOnPassUps: No cap on how far up the chain pass-ups can travel
compPlan.receivedPassUpsCascade: Received pass-ups count in the recipient's own pattern
compPlan.mustHaveActiveMembership: Must have active $20/mo membership to earn course commissions
compPlan.superMarketDesc: A JVZoo-style digital product marketplace built right into SuperAdPro. Members create digital products, list them on SuperMarket, and the entire network promotes them for commissions.
compPlan.acrossAllSelectedTiers: Across all selected tiers and streams
compPlan.calculatorDisclaimer: All figures are projections based on your selected scenario. Uni-level calculations assume full grid completion (64 seats) per advance. Direct sponsor commissions assume all referrals activate the selected tiers. Actual earnings depend entirely on your personal activity and network performance. Income is not guaranteed.

wallet.title: ◎ Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Your balance, commissions & withdrawals
wallet.affiliateWalletDesc: Membership referrals, Creative Studio sponsor commissions, course sales, Pay It Forward.
wallet.campaignWalletDesc: Grid commissions: 40% direct sponsor, 6.25% uni-level, completion bonus.
wallet.campaignFeeNote: Min $10 · Fee $1.00 · Active tier + watch quota required
wallet.noCampaignEarnings: No campaign earnings yet. Activate a Campaign Tier to start earning grid commissions.
wallet.referAndActivate: Refer members and activate your grid to start earning.
wallet.graceWarning: Balance insufficient at renewal — top up to $20 USDT.
wallet.renewalAutoDeducted: Your $20 renewal is deducted automatically from your wallet. As long as your wallet has funds your membership stays active — no manual action needed.
wallet.sendFundsDesc: Transfer USDT to any active member using their member ID (e.g. SAP-00042). Instant and fee-free.
wallet.sendLimits: Min $1 · Max $500 per transfer · Active members only

watch.title: Watch to Earn
watch.watchedAllAvailable: You've watched all {{watched}} available video(s) but your daily quota is {{limit}}. Check back later as new campaigns are added.
watch.watchedAllRequired: You've watched all {{count}} required videos today. Your commissions are fully qualified. Come back tomorrow!
watch.topEarners: Top earners never miss a day.
watch.checkBackSoon: Check back soon — campaigns are added as advertisers activate their tiers.
watch.watchedOfToday: You watched {{watched}} of {{limit}} video(s) today. Your campaign wallet withdrawals are qualified.
watch.missedDays: You've missed {{count}} day(s). Complete today's quota to protect your earnings.
watch.statusReady: ✓ Ready — tap to mark as watched
watch.watchInstructions: Videos must be watched for 30 seconds with this tab active to qualify. Complete {{limit}} per day to maintain commission eligibility.
watch.returnToTab: Return to this tab to continue

courseCreate.commissionDesc: When your course sells: you keep 100% on odd sales (1st, 3rd, 5th...) and pass up even sales (2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th) to your sponsor. Your sponsor must own the same tier to receive the pass-up.

upgrade.proDesc: Full suite of AI marketing tools plus advanced automation and leads.

upgrade.earnWhileGrowDesc: Refer a member and earn 50% commission — every month they stay active, or one big payout on annual billing.

visualiser.title: Visualiser
visualiser.subtitle: Watch your income streams come to life
visualiser.pressPlayToWatch: Press Play to watch your team build...
visualiser.simulationDisclaimer: Simulation for educational purposes only. Actual earnings depend on personal activity and network performance. Income is not guaranteed.
visualiser.yourGridFills: Your grid fills from your entire network
visualiser.gridFillsDesc: Every person who joins anywhere in your downline fills a seat in your grid. Your direct referrals AND their referrals AND deeper — all the way down. One person, one seat, per advance.

features.linkToolsDesc: Short links, QR codes, UTM tracking

campaignTiers.title: Campaign Tiers
campaignTiers.subtitle: Activate tiers to advertise your videos and earn grid commissions
campaignTiers.heroDesc: Each tier delivers real video views through Watch & Earn. You earn commissions as your grid fills with 64 members.
campaignTiers.howItWorksDesc: Each tier gives your videos real views through the Watch & Earn network. When you activate a tier, you are placed into an 8×8 grid with 64 member positions.
campaignTiers.renewalDesc: Tiers expire once all allocated views have been delivered. To continue receiving views and earning grid commissions, simply re-activate the tier. All one-time USDT payments — no subscriptions or recurring charges.
campaignTiers.earningsDisclaimer: Earnings based on 5 personal referrals. Income may vary depending on the number of personals referred into your grid.
